_comment: PUBLIC registrant contact for Free For Charity (umbrella owner). PUBLIC INFORMATION ONLY: every value matches FFC's public 501(c)(3) record / public website and is the WHOIS registrant for FFC-owned charity domains. Do NOT put any individual charity's private contact details here - those live only in WHMCS (see scripts/whmcs-client-add.ps1 / whmcs-contact-add.ps1). This registrant is independent of WHMCS client records. Address sourced from freeforcharity.org.
